---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement
---

### Problem

What are you trying to do that splitdns does not currently support?

### Proposed solution

What you would like it to do. If it is provider-specific (e.g. a DNS host other than
Cloudflare), note how it would fit behind the existing mirror/forwarder interfaces.

### Alternatives

Anything you have considered or worked around.
